display.purpose: Major page headers and high-level KPIs.

body.purpose: Standard reading text in tables and descriptions.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Separating modals and the sidebar from the background.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button for the dashboard.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2563eb; color: #fff; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; border: none; transition: background 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Indicator for job and invoice status.
components.css: .ds-badge { padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-badge-scheduled { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; }

narrative.overview: Axira Lite is a high-density, functional environment designed for operational speed. It rejects the 'softness' of modern consumer SaaS in favor of a rigid, geometric aesthetic.
keyCharacteristics: Zero gradients or shadows at rest

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The primary accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen.

rules.name: The Surface Separation Rule
rules.body: Overlays like Modals and the Sidebar use subtle shadows to separate from the background.

dos: Do use strict 8px spacing multiples for all layout gaps.
Do ensure all text has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1.
Do keep information density high in data tables.
donts: Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards.
Don't use background gradients or text gradients.
Don't add shadows to buttons or standard dashboard cards.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy.
